name: Akinator
description: Play a guessing game where Akinator tries to identify who or what you have in mind.

start_game.description: Start a new Akinator round for a selected thematic.

thematic.description: The thematic to play with for the new Akinator round.

restart_game.description: Restart Akinator with the previously selected thematic.

guess.description: Answer Akinator's current question to continue the round.

answer.description: The owner's answer to the current Akinator question.

retry.description: Confirm whether the owner wants another Akinator round.

confirmation.description: Whether the owner wants to immediately play another round.
